'''kaporo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xhamadan|xhamadan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xhamadan|xhamadan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kaporo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæpereth|kæpereth]] || [[word:kæperej|kæperej]] || [[word:kæperesh|kæperesh]] || [[word:kæpere|kæpere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kapoporoth|kapoporoth]] || [[word:kapoporoj|kapoporoj]] || [[word:kapoporosh|kapoporosh]] || [[word:kapoporo|kapoporo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kaporoth|kaporoth]] || [[word:kaporoj|kaporoj]] || [[word:kaporosh|kaporosh]] || [[word:kaporo|kaporo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kapofroth|kapofroth]] || [[word:kapofroj|kapofroj]] || [[word:kapofrosh|kapofrosh]] || [[word:kapofrof|kapofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kaporotho|kaporotho]] || [[word:kaporojo|kaporojo]] || [[word:kaporosho|kaporosho]] || [[word:kaporoko|kaporoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kaporoth|kaporoth]] || [[word:kaporoj|kaporoj]] || [[word:kaporosh|kaporosh]] || [[word:kaporo|kaporo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kaporothol|kaporothol]] || [[word:kaporojol|kaporojol]] || [[word:kaporoshol|kaporoshol]] || [[word:kaporokol|kaporokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kaporothotho|kaporothotho]] || [[word:kaporojojo|kaporojojo]] || [[word:kaporoshosho|kaporoshosho]] || [[word:kaporoko|kaporoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kaporothon|kaporothon]] || [[word:kaporojon|kaporojon]] || [[word:kaporoshon|kaporoshon]] || [[word:kaporokon|kaporokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kaporothoro|kaporothoro]] || [[word:kaporojoro|kaporojoro]] || [[word:kaporoshoro|kaporoshoro]] || [[word:kaporokoro|kaporokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
